Fixed accept-terms 401: store tos_reaccept_email in session during email/password login so accept-terms POST can identify the user
Fixed login redirect loop: login.html now handles requires_tos_acceptance response and redirects to /accept-terms for users with NULL tos_version
Fixed login error by running existing add_tos_columns.py migration. Added 3 missing columns to users table.

Phase 3 & 4 complete. Enhanced logging: --reason flag, helper scripts, CLAUDE.md updates. Analytics: stats endpoint, export JSON/CSV, UI buttons. Files: active-sessions.js (--reason support), session-crash.sh, session-timeout.sh, ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md (patterns), src/app/api/sessions/stats/route.ts, src/app/api/sessions/export/route.ts, src/lib/sessions/actions.ts (export), src/components/FlowsSidebar/SessionsTab.tsx (stats/export buttons). Build passes. All 4 phases complete! 🎉
Ran MSFT DCF analysis. Fixed Unicode encoding bug (force_terminal=True). Reviewed methodology — fundamentally sound, noted conservative 3.2% growth rate and unused growth decay blend.

Phase 1 & 2 complete: Enhanced backend (types, API, logging) + Enhanced UI (formatting, actions, rich cards with dismiss/mark-done buttons, auto-stale-conversion). Build passes. Files: src/types/sessions.ts, src/app/api/sessions/route.ts (GET+POST), src/lib/sessions/formatting.ts, src/lib/sessions/actions.ts, src/components/FlowsSidebar/SessionsTab.tsx, ~/.openclaw/workspace/active-sessions.js. Phase 3 & 4 remain (logging DX, analytics).
Health check complete. Found stale MCO/Twitter data from missed Friday post-market job. All current jobs running normally.
Completed: CLAUDE.md (repo guide), sessions tab auto-refresh on selection, session tracking analysis (quit vs /clear, sleep behavior), PLAN-advanced-session-tracking.md. Starting implementation now.
Completed research on Ollama Cloud and Groq Cloud free tier models for sentiment analysis
PR #74 created successfully with screenshots. Old PR #73 already closed.
Commits created and pushed to fork. Ready for upstream PR.
Completed: Driver practice drills (30+ drills, 470 lines) and README with document index + 8 future ideas. All pushed.
UI redesign complete: consolidated Cron/Sessions/Captures into collapsible right sidebar with tabs. Deleted 3 page routes + 3 widget components. All functionality migrated. Build passes clean.
Completed: Match scouting data model. 294 lines covering full per-robot data schema, derived metrics, pick list formula, paper scouting layout, storage options, and FMS cross-referencing.
Completed: Alliance selection strategy guide. Covers 3 alliance roles, scouting priorities, pick strategy by seed, decline decisions, backup teams, common mistakes, decision framework.

Completed: Pipeline ran 160 attacks on Claude Sonnet 4.5. Key finding: 6.9% success rate overall, but 45% for Authority Impersonation. Analysis complete, 11 cases need physician review. Paper draft ready for results fill-in.
Completed cron gateway consolidation. Rewrote cron page + CronWidget to use GatewayClient WebSocket RPC. Added updateCronJob() to types.ts. Deleted file-based API route. Build passes clean.

Completed: Read full 166-page 2026 FRC REBUILT game manual. Created 4 reference files: GAME-REFERENCE.md (comprehensive game summary), SCORING-QUICK-REF.md (scoring/strategy quick ref), memory/MEMORY.md, memory/game-details.md. Also extracted manual_text.txt for future searches.

Runner completed but 0 attacks generated. Issue: attacker agent returns JSON wrapped in markdown code blocks, parser expects raw JSON. All 160 attack attempts failed to parse. Cost: .11, Time: 19m 32s. Files: checkpoint.json, run.log created. No results_raw.jsonl generated. Analysis cannot run without data.

Completed full red-teaming framework: 8 attack categories, attacker/target/evaluator agents, runner orchestration, analysis module with visualizations, paper outline, comprehensive documentation. Files: config.py, src/attacker.py, src/target.py, src/evaluator.py, src/runner.py, src/utils.py, analysis/analyze.py, prompts/*.md, README.md, QUICKSTART.md, requirements.txt, .env.example, verify_setup.py. Ready to run end-to-end.
